system.descriptor: Athletics measures a character's ability to run, climb, swim, and perform other physical feats of endurance and coordination.
system.uses:
Uses: Climbing, jumping, running, swimming, and other physically demanding tasks.
Special Use: Heft: As a Free Action, make an Athletics test to move heavy objects. Each Degree of Success adds +10 to effective Strength for the purpose of determining carrying capacity for one Round.
Special Use: Swim: When swimming, make an Athletics test each Round to stay afloat and make progress. Failure by 3+ DoF means the character begins to drown.

description.value: Athletics measures a character's ability to run, climb, swim, and perform other physical feats of endurance and coordination.
